author: tylergibbs
abstract: Orchestrate a multi-agent implementation. The calling agent acts as orchestrator: it scouts the repo, freezes shared contracts, decomposes the task into independent subtasks, dispatches one subagent per subtask in parallel, and briefs each with self-contained context plus a mandate to pull fresh docs via Context7. Covers Claude Code subagents, Claude Code dynamic workflows, and Codex subagents.
